Off Calendar May-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: KEVIN SINGER'S Motion For Order 1) Approving And Settling Receiver's Final Report and Account 2)Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Receiver; Etc. Appearances: Kevin Singer, Esq., Superior Court Receiver, (415) 848-2984, appearing for Receiver. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in Open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Feb-23-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause and Temporary Restraining Order. Appearances: Simon Aron, Esq. of Wolf, Rifkin, Shapiro, Schulman & Rabkin, (310) 478-4100 ext. 243, (Appearing thru CourtCall); appearing for Plaintiff, and moving party; There are no other appearances. Plaintiff's counsel failed to give notice to opposing counsel, that he planned to appear and argue. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar. Plaintiff's counsel failed to give notice of the other side pursuant to Local Rule, 8.3. (302/CWW) (Also, Plaintiff's Proof of Service of Order to Show Cause was received, however, is untimely served.) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
